'''Kinun Depot''' was a location where the [[Rodian/Legends|Rodian]] [[Slavery/Legends|slaver]] [[Malak (Rodian)|Malak]] made a stop sometime before [[0 ABY/Legends|0 ABY]], to refuel her [[Starship/Legends|ship]]. During this time her captured prey, [[Myo/Legends|Myo]], escaped from his custody. Myo then met the [[Musician/Legends|musician]] [[Lirin Car'n/Legends|Lirin Car'n]], and the two became associates. Car'n helped Myo to reach [[Tatooine/Legends|Tatooine]].<ref name="AIR">''[[Alliance Intelligence Reports]]''</ref>
